name: memory
description: Persistent memory for Claude Code: raw capture via hooks (SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/Stop/SessionEnd), hybrid BM25 + semantic search (sqlite-vec + local transformers.js embeddings) via MCP. Embedded local SQLite storage — zero server, zero daemon, zero cloud.

embedTier.title: Semantic embedding tier
embedTier.description: light = e5-small (384 dim, ~120 MB, fast) · medium = e5-base (768 dim, ~280 MB, best FR trade-off) · heavy = e5-large (1024 dim, ~560 MB, max quality). Changeable later via /memory:config.
